name: BROWNFIELD (MATTHEW & KRISTIN)
address: 3126 NW QUIET RIVER LN, BEND, OR 97701

fr.elements: Main Building; Roof System; Landscaped Area; Open Green Space; Front Driveway
fr.considerations: Limited Side Access; Dense Vegetation; Single Access Point
fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency response effectiveness for this property could include measures such as clearing dense vegetation to improve visibility and movement, particularly around the single access point and main routes that responders would use. Constructing a secondary access point or widening the existing single entry point could facilitate smoother ingress and egress, reducing potential bottlenecks. Maintaining open and unobstructed pathways around the main building and along the driveway may enhance responder mobility and allow for more efficient staging operations. Ensuring that any designated access routes are kept clear, especially near landscaped areas, can support timely navigation and expedite emergency response efforts throughout the site.

wildfire.conditions: Vegetation Adjacent to Structure; Vegetated Perimeter; Scattered Trees; Vegetation Adjacent to Structure; Scattered Shrubs; Open Terrain; Vegetated Access Route; Defensible Space
wildfire.recommendations: Improving the separation between vegetation and the structure by managing vegetation adjacent to the building could enhance defensible space and help reduce potential structure exposure. Strategic pruning or removal of selected shrubs and small trees near the residence may reduce fuel continuity and lower the chance of direct flame contact. Maintaining a clear perimeter along any access routes by selectively thinning vegetation can support safer firefighter access and more efficient suppression operations. The open terrain should be preserved to ensure it continues to act as a natural buffer zone, potentially assisting in reducing fire spread across the property. Regular management of scattered trees and shrubs across the property may further support long-term wildfire resilience, promoting a well-prepared and defensible landscape.
